productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Check Red Muffler
description: Enjoy the winter in style this season with this red and black check muffler from Reid and Taylor. Drape it over your kurtas or knot it over your t-shirts and enjoy that hot street food in the early morning mist with comfort. Length: 160 cm Width: 31 cm Made of lamb's wool to offer snug warmth Red and black checks with tassels for style Wash care Dry clean recommended Hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Dry flat in shade Cool iron
